name: Focus Wash 400

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: E4E02DD8-3EF5-4744-A651-3F74A7A24FCA

comment: Focus Wash: The FOCUS WASH 400 is a 400W, RGBACL (Red, Green, Blue, Amber, Cyan and Lime) LED moving head wash with a 10 to 41 degree motorized zoom, with flicker free operation for TV and film, linear white color temperature control from 2700K - 6500K, and virtual CMY color mixing.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast

gwSpecs.description: The FOCUS WASH 400 is a 400W, RGBACL (Red, Green, Blue, Amber, Cyan and Lime) LED moving head wash with a 10 to 41 degree motorized zoom, with flicker free operation for TV and film, linear white color temperature control from 2700K - 6500K, and virtual CMY color mixing.
